info.description: Synopsys, Inc. engages in the provision of electronic design automation (EDA) software that engineers use to design and test integrated circuits (ICs). It also offers semiconductor intellectual property (IP) products. It operates through the Design Automation and Design IP segments. The Design Automation segment includes silicon design, verification of products and services, and Ansys products, and system integration of products and services. The Design IP segment refers to interface, foundation, security, and embedded processor IP, IP subsystems, and IP implementation services that serve companies primarily in the semiconductor and electronics industries. The company was founded by Aart J. de Geus, Bill Krieger, Dave Gregory, and Rick Rudell in December 1986 and is headquartered in Sunnyvale, CA.
info.description_zh: Synopsys, Inc. 致力於提供工程師用來設計和測試積體電路 (IC) 的電子設計自動化 (EDA) 軟體。它還提供半導體知識產權（IP）產品。它透過設計自動化和設計 IP 部門運作。設計自動化部門包括晶片設計、產品和服務驗證、Ansys 產品以及產品和服務的系統整合。設計IP部分涉及介面、基礎、安全和嵌入式處理器IP、IP子系統和IP實施服務，主要為半導體和電子行業的公司提供服務。該公司由 Aart J. de Geus、Bill Krieger、Dave Gregory 和 Rick Rudell 於 1986 年 12 月創立，總部位於加州桑尼維爾。

info.description: D.R. Horton, Inc. engages in the construction and sale of single-family housing. It operates through the following geographical segments: Northwest, Southwest, South Central, Southeast, East, and North. The Northwest segment relates to Colorado, Oregon, Utah, and Washington. The Southwest segment covers Arizona, California, Hawaii, Nevada, and New Mexico. The South Central segment is involved in Arkansas, Oklahoma, and Texas. The Southeast segment refers to Alabama, Florida, Louisiana, and Mississippi. The East segment operates Georgia, North Carolina, South Carolina, and Tennessee. The North segment focuses on Delaware, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kentucky, Maryland, Minnesota, Nebraska, New Jersey, Ohio, Pennsylvania, Virginia, and West Virginia. The company was founded by Donald Ray Horton in 1978 and is headquartered in Arlington, TX.
info.description_zh: 博士Horton, Inc. 從事單戶住宅的建設和銷售。它透過以下地理區域運作：西北、西南、中南、東南、東部和北部。西北段涉及科羅拉多州、俄勒岡州、猶他州和華盛頓州。西南部包括亞利桑那州、加利福尼亞州、夏威夷州、內華達州和新墨西哥州。中南部部分涉及阿肯色州、俄克拉荷馬州和德克薩斯州。東南部分是指阿拉巴馬州、佛羅裡達州、路易斯安那州和密西西比州。東部部門經營喬治亞州、北卡羅來納州、南卡羅來納州和田納西州。北部部分主要集中在德拉瓦州、伊利諾州、印第安納州、愛荷華州、肯塔基州、馬裡蘭州、明尼蘇達州、內布拉斯加州、紐澤西州、俄亥俄州、賓州、維吉尼亞州和西維吉尼亞州。該公司由 Donald Ray Horton 於 1978 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州阿靈頓。

info.description: Apollo Global Management, Inc. provides asset management services. It offers its clients excess return at every point along the risk-reward spectrum from investment grade to private equity with a focus on three business strategies: yield, hybrid, and equity. It operates through following segments: Asset Management, Retirement Services and Principal Investing. The Asset Management segment focuses on credit and equity investing strategies. The Retirement Services and Principal Investing segment consists of realized performance fee income, realized investment income from balance sheet investments, and certain allocable expenses related to corporate functions supporting the entire company. The company was founded by Marc Rowan in 1990 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Apollo Global Management, Inc. 提供資產管理服務。它為客戶提供從投資等級到私募股權的風險回報範圍內每個點的超額回報，重點關註三種業務策略：收益、混合和股權。它透過以下部門運作：資產管理部門、退休服務部門和本金投資部門。資產管理部門專注於信貸和股權投資策略。退休服務和本金投資部門包括已實現的績效費收入、資產負債表投資的已實現投資收入以及與支持整個公司的公司職能相關的某些可分配費用。該公司由 Marc Rowan 於 1990 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: NXP Semiconductors NV is a holding company which engages in the provision of semiconductor solutions. It operates through the following geographical segments: China, Netherlands, United States, Singapore, Germany, Japan, South Korea, Malaysia, and Other Countries. The company was founded on August 2, 2006, and is headquartered in Eindhoven, the Netherlands.
info.description_zh: NXP Semiconductors NV 是一家提供半導體解決方案的控股公司。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：中國、荷蘭、美國、新加坡、德國、日本、韓國、馬來西亞和其他國家。該公司成立於2006年8月2日，總部位於荷蘭埃因霍溫。

info.description: AppLovin Corp. engages in the development and operation of a mobile marketing platform. It offers AppDiscovery, MAX, Adjust, and SparkLabs. Its software-based platform caters to mobile application developers to improve the marketing and monetization of applications. The company was founded by Andrew Karam, John Krystynak, and Adam Foroughi in 2011 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: AppLovin Corp.從事行動行銷平台的開發與營運。它提供 AppDiscovery、MAX、Adjust 和 SparkLabs。其基於軟體的平台迎合行動應用程式開發人員的需求，以改善應用程式的行銷和貨幣化。該公司由 Andrew Karam、John Krystynak 和 Adam Foroughi 於 2011 年創立，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: Pool Corp. engages in the wholesale distribution of swimming pool supplies, equipment, and related leisure products. It also offers non-discretionary pool maintenance products such as chemicals and replacement parts, discretionary products like packaged pool kits, whole goods, irrigation, and landscape products, including a complete line of commercial and residential irrigation products and parts, power equipment for the professional landscape market, specialty products such as outdoor lighting, grills, and outdoor kitchen components, and golf irrigation and water management products. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Covington, LA.
info.description_zh: Pool Corp. 從事游泳池用品、設備和相關休閒產品的批發分銷。它還提供非全權泳池維護產品，如化學品和替換零件，全權產品，如包裝泳池套件、整體商品、灌溉和景觀產品，包括全系列商業和住宅灌溉產品和零件，專業景觀市場的電力設備，戶外照明、烤架和戶外廚房組件等特色產品，以及高爾夫灌溉和水管理產品。該公司成立於 1993 年，總部位於路易斯安那州卡溫頓。

info.description: Coinbase Global, Inc. engages in the provision of a trusted platform that serves as a compliant on-ramp to the onchain economy and enables users to engage in a wide variety of activities with their crypto assets in both proprietary and third-party product experiences enabled by access to decentralized applications. It offers consumers primary financial account for the cryptoeconomy, institutions a full-service prime brokerage platform with access to deep pools of liquidity across the crypto marketplace, and developers a suite of products granting access to build onchain. The company was founded by Brian Armstrong and Fred Ernest Ehrsam in May 2012 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: Coinbase Global, Inc. 致力於提供一個值得信賴的平台，作為鏈上經濟的合規入口，使用戶能夠透過訪問去中心化應用程序，在專有和第三方產品體驗中使用其加密資產參與各種活動。它為消費者提供加密經濟的主要金融帳戶，為機構提供全方位服務的主要經紀平台，可以存取整個加密市場的深層流動性池，並為開發人員提供一套允許在鏈上構建的產品。該公司由 Brian Armstrong 和 Fred Ernest Ehrsam 於 2012 年 5 月創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Fiserv, Inc. engages in the provision of financial services technology. It operates through the Merchant and Financial segments. The Merchant segment offers commerce-enabling products and services including merchant acquiring and digital commerce and mobile payment services, and security and fraud protection, stored-value, and pay-by-bank solutions to companies of all sizes. The Financial segment provides products and services such as processing of customer loan and deposit accounts, digital payments, and card transactions to financial institutions and corporate and public sector clients. The company was founded by Leslie M. Muma and George D. Dalton on July 31, 1984 and is headquartered in Milwaukee, WI.
info.description_zh: Fiserv, Inc. 從事提供金融服務技術。它透過商業和金融部門運作。商家部門為各種規模的公司提供商業支援產品和服務，包括商家收單、數位商務和行動支付服務，以及安全和詐欺保護、儲值和銀行支付解決方案。金融部門向金融機構以及企業和公共部門客戶提供客戶貸款和存款帳戶處理、數位支付和卡片交易等產品和服務。該公司由 Leslie M. Muma 和 George D. Dalton 於 1984 年 7 月 31 日創立，總部位於威斯康辛州密爾瓦基。

info.description: Align Technology, Inc. is a medical device company, which engages in the design, manufacture, and market of orthodontics, restorative, and aesthetic dentistry products. It operates through the Clear Aligner and Systems and Services segments. The Clear Aligner segment consists of invisalign full, teen, and assist products, and Vivera retainers for treating malocclusion. The Systems and Services segment includes sales related to iTero intraoral scanning systems, which includes a single hardware platform and restorative or orthodontic software options, upgrades and leases of scanner systems, sales of pre-owned scanner systems, subscription software, disposables, pay per scan services, as well as exocad's CAD/CAM software solutions that integrate workflows to dental labs and dental practices. The company was founded by Zia Chishti, Brian Freyburger, and Kelsey Wirth in March 1997 and is headquartered in Tempe, AZ.
info.description_zh: Align Technology, Inc.是一家醫療器材公司，從事矯正、修復和美容牙科產品的設計、製造和銷售。它透過 Clear Aligner 以及系統和服務部門運作。 Clear Aligner 部分包括 Invisalign 完整版、青少年版和輔助產品，以及用於治療咬合不正的 Vivera 固定器。系統和服務部門包括與 iTero 口內掃描系統相關的銷售，其中包括單一硬體平台和修復或矯正軟體選項、掃描器系統的升級和租賃、二手掃描器系統的銷售、訂閱軟體、一次性用品、按掃描付費服務，以及將工作流程整合到牙科實驗室和牙科診所的 exocad CAD/CAM 軟體解決方案。該公司由 Zia Chishti、Brian Freyburger 和 Kelsey Wirth 於 1997 年 3 月創立，總部位於亞利桑那州坦佩。

info.description: Apple, Inc. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables and accessories, and other varieties of related services. It operates through the following geographical segments: Americas, Europe, Greater China, Japan, and Rest of Asia Pacific. The Americas segment includes North and South America. The Europe segment consists of European countries, as well as India, the Middle East, and Africa. The Greater China segment comprises China, Hong Kong, and Taiwan. The Rest of Asia Pacific segment includes Australia and Asian countries. Its products and services include iPhone, Mac, iPad, AirPods, Apple TV, Apple Watch, Beats products, AppleCare, iCloud, digital content stores, streaming, and licensing services. The company was founded by Steven Paul Jobs, Ronald Gerald Wayne, and Stephen G. Wozniak in April 1976 and is headquartered in Cupertino, CA.
info.description_zh: 蘋果從事智慧型手機、個人電腦、平板電腦、穿戴式裝置和配件的設計、製造和銷售以及其他各種相關服務。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美洲、歐洲、大中華區、日本和亞太地區其他地區。美洲部分包括北美和南美。歐洲部分包括歐洲國家以及印度、中東和非洲。大中華區業務包括中國大陸、香港和台灣。亞太其他地區包括澳洲和亞洲國家。其產品和服務包括 iPhone、Mac、iPad、AirPods、Apple TV、Apple Watch、Beats 產品、AppleCare、iCloud、數位內容商店、串流媒體和授權服務。該公司由 Steven Paul Jobs、Ronald Gerald Wayne 和 Stephen G. Wozniak 於 1976 年 4 月創立，總部位於加州庫比蒂諾。

info.description: Corpay, Inc. engages in the provision of digital payment solutions that enable businesses to control purchases and make payments. It operates through the following segments: Vehicle Payments, Corporate Payments, Lodging Payments and Other. The Vehicle Payments segment helps, controls and monitors spending and includes fuel card offerings, tolls and other complementary products. The Corporate Payments segment simplifies and automates vendor payments and includes accounts payable (AP) automation, virtual cards, cross-border payments and purchasing and travel and entertainment (T&E) card products. The Lodging Payments segment helps businesses manage lodging costs, while simplifying the management of hotels and housing, both short and longer-term, while also providing traveler and end customer support. The Other segment includes gift solutions and payroll card solution. It also operates through the following geographical segments: U.S., Brazil and the United Kingdom. The company was founded by William Boatner Reily III and Ronald F. Clarke in 1985 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Corpay, Inc. 致力於提供數位支付解決方案，使企業能夠控制購買和付款。它透過以下部門運作：車輛付款、公司付款、住宿付款和其他。車輛支付部門幫助、控制和監控支出，包括加油卡產品、通行費和其他補充產品。企業支付部門簡化和自動化供應商付款，包括應付帳款 (AP) 自動化、虛擬卡、跨境支付以及採購、旅行和娛樂 (T&E) 卡產品。住宿支付部門幫助企業管理住宿成本，同時簡化短期和長期飯店和住房的管理，同時也為旅客和最終客戶提供支援。其他部分包括禮品解決方案和工資卡解決方案。它還透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、巴西和英國。該公司由 William Boatner Reily III 和 Ronald F. Clarke 於 1985 年創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Datadog, Inc. engages in the development of a monitoring and analytics platform for developers, information technology operations teams and business users. Its platform integrates and automates infrastructure monitoring, application performance monitoring and log management to provide real-time observability of its customers' entire technology stack. The company was founded by Olivier Pomel and Alexis Le-Quoc on June 4, 2010 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Datadog, Inc. 致力於為開發人員、資訊科技營運團隊和業務使用者開發監控和分析平台。其平台整合並自動化基礎設施監控、應用程式效能監控和日誌管理，以提供客戶整個技術堆疊的即時可觀察性。該公司由 Olivier Pomel 和 Alexis Le-Quoc 於 2010 年 6 月 4 日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Ares Management Corp. engages in the provision of investment and consultancy services. It operates through the following segments: Credit Group, Private Equity Group, Real Assets Group, Secondaries Group, and Other. The Credit Group segment includes the management of strategies across the liquid and illiquid spectrum, direct lending, and Asia-Pacific. The Private Equity Group segment involves the categorization of investment strategies as corporate, special opportunities, and Asia-Pacific. The Real Assets Group segment focuses on equity and debt strategies across infrastructure investments. The Secondaries Group segment consists of investment in secondary markets, alternative asset class strategies, private equity, real estate, infrastructure, and credit. The company was founded by Michael J. Arougheti, David B. Kaplan, John H. Kissick, Antony P. Ressler, and Bennett Rosenthal in 1997 and is headquartered in Los Angeles, CA.
info.description_zh: Ares Management Corp. 從事提供投資和諮詢服務。它透過以下部門運作：信貸部門、私募股權部門、實物資產部門、二級部門和其他部門。信貸集團部門包括流動性和非流動性、直接貸款和亞太地區的策略管理。私募股權集團部門將投資策略分類為企業、特殊機會和亞太地區。實體資產集團部門專注於基礎設施投資的股權和債務策略。二級市場部門包括二級市場投資、另類資產類別策略、私募股權、房地產、基礎設施和信貸。該公司由 Michael J. Arougheti、David B. Kaplan、John H. Kissick、Antony P. Ressler 和 Bennett Rosenthal 於 1997 年創立，總部位於加州洛杉磯。

info.description: S&P Global, Inc. engages in the provision of transparent and independent ratings, benchmarks, analytics, and data to the capital and commodity markets worldwide. It operates through the following segments: Market Intelligence, Ratings, Mobility, Indices, and Engineering Solutions. The Market Intelligence segment provides multi-asset-class data and analytics integrated with purpose-built workflow solutions. The Ratings segment is involved in credit ratings, research, and analytics, offering investors and other market participants information, ratings, and benchmarks. The Mobility segment offers solutions serving the full automotive value chain including vehicle manufacturers, automotive suppliers, mobility service providers, retailers, consumers, and finance and insurance companies. The Engineering Solutions segment engages in advanced knowledge discovery technologies, research tools, and software-based engineering decision engines to advance innovation, maximize productivity, improve quality, and reduce risk. The company was founded by James H. McGraw and John A. Hill in 1917 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: S&P Global, Inc. 致力於向全球資本和商品市場提供透明和獨立的評級、基準、分析和數據。它透過以下部門運作：市場情報、評級、移動、指數和工程解決方案。市場情報部門提供與專門建構的工作流程解決方案整合的多資產類別資料和分析。評級部門涉及信用評級、研究和分析，為投資者和其他市場參與者提供資訊、評級和基準。行動部門提供服務整個汽車價值鏈的解決方案，包括汽車製造商、汽車供應商、行動服務提供者、零售商、消費者以及金融和保險公司。工程解決方案部門致力於先進的知識發現技術、研究工具和基於軟體的工程決策引擎，以推進創新、最大限度地提高生產力、提高品質並降低風險。該公司由 James H. McGraw 和 John A. Hill 於 1917 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: DoorDash, Inc. engages in the design, development, and operation of a food delivery and logistics platform. It serves consumers in the United States, Canada, and Australia. The company was founded by Andy Fang, Tony Xu, Stanley Tang, and Evan Moore on January 12, 2013 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: DoorDash, Inc. 從事食品配送和物流平台的設計、開發和營運。它為美國、加拿大和澳洲的消費者提供服務。該公司由 Andy Fang、Tony Xu、Stanley Tang 和 Evan Moore 於 2013 年 1 月 12 日創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: PulteGroup, Inc. engages in the homebuilding business. The firm is also involved in mortgage banking and title and insurance brokerage operations. It operates through the Homebuilding and Financial services business segments. The Homebuilding segment includes operations from Connecticut, Maryland, Massachusetts, New Jersey, New York, Pennsylvania, Virginia, Georgia, North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee, Florida, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Michigan, Minnesota, Missouri, Ohio, Texas, Arizona, California, Nevada, New Mexico, and Washington. The Financial Services segment is composed of mortgage banking and title operations. The company was founded by William J. Pulte in 1950 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: PulteGroup, Inc. 從事住宅建築業務。該公司還涉足抵押銀行業務以及產權和保險經紀業務。它透過住宅建築和金融服務業務部門運作。住宅建築部門包括康乃狄克州、馬裡蘭州、麻薩諸塞州、紐澤西州、紐約州、賓州、維吉尼亞州、喬治亞州、北卡羅來納州、南卡羅來納州、田納西州、佛羅裡達州、伊利諾州、印第安納州、肯塔基州、密西根州、明尼蘇達州、密蘇裡州、俄亥俄州、德州、亞利桑那州、加利福尼亞州、內華達州、新墨西哥州和內華達州的業務。金融服務部門由抵押銀行業務和產權業務組成。該公司由 William J. Pulte 於 1950 年創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Shopify, Inc. is a global commerce company that provides essential internet infrastructure for commerce, offering trusted tools to start, scale, market, and run a retail business of any size. The Company's software enables merchants to run their business across all of their sales channels, including web and mobile storefronts, physical retail locations, social media storefronts and marketplaces. The Shopify platform provides merchants with a single view of their business across all of their sales channels and enables them to manage products and inventory, process orders and payments, fulfill and ship orders, build customer relationships, source products, leverage analytics and reporting and access financing, all from one integrated back office. The company was founded on September 28, 2004 and is headquartered in Ottawa, Canada.
info.description_zh: Shopify, Inc. 是一家全球商業公司，為商業提供必要的網路基礎設施，並提供值得信賴的工具來啟動、擴展、行銷和經營任何規模的零售業務。該公司的軟體使商家能夠在所有銷售管道上開展業務，包括網路和行動店面、實體零售店、社交媒體店面和市場。 Shopify 平台為商家提供了跨所有銷售管道的單一業務視圖，使他們能夠管理產品和庫存、處理訂單和付款、履行和發貨訂單、建立客戶關係、採購產品、利用分析和報告以及獲取融資，所有這些都透過一個整合後台進行。該公司成立於2004年9月28日，總部位於加拿大渥太華。

info.description: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. engages in the provision of freight transportation services and logistics solutions. It operates through the following segments: North American Surface Transportation (NAST), Global Forwarding, and All Other and Corporate. The NAST segment provides freight transportation services across North America through a network of offices in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. The Global Forwarding segment focuses on the global logistics services through an international network of offices in North America, Europe, Asia, Australia, New Zealand, and South America. The All Other and Corporate segment includes Robinson Fresh and Managed Services segments, as well as other surface transportation outside of North America and other miscellaneous revenues and unallocated corporate expenses. The company was founded by Charles Henry Robinson in 1905 and is headquartered in Eden Prairie, MN.
info.description_zh: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. 從事提供貨運服務和物流解決方案。該公司透過以下部門運營：北美地面運輸部門 (NAST)、全球貨運部門以及所有其他部門和企業部門。 NAST 部門透過位於美國、加拿大和墨西哥的辦事處網路提供橫跨北美的貨運服務。全球貨運部門專注於透過北美、歐洲、亞洲、澳洲、紐西蘭和南美辦事處的國際網路提供全球物流服務。所有其他和企业部门包括 Robinson Fresh 和管理服务部门，以及北美以外的其他地面运输以及其他杂项收入和未分配的公司支出。該公司由 Charles Henry Robinson 於 1905 年創立，總部位於明尼蘇達州伊甸草原。

info.description: Las Vegas Sands Corp. engages in the development of destination properties. It operates through the Macao and Singapore geographical segments. The Macao segment handles the operations of The Venetian Macao, The Londoner Macao, The Parisian Macao, The Plaza Macao and Four Seasons Macao, and Sands Macao. The Singapore segment includes the Marina Bay Sands. The company was founded by Sheldon Gary Adelson in August 2004 and is headquartered in Las Vegas, NV.
info.description_zh: 拉斯維加斯金沙集團 (Las Vegas Sands Corp.) 從事目的地物業的開發。它透過澳門和新加坡地理部門開展業務。澳門分部負責澳門威尼斯人酒店、澳門倫敦人酒店、澳門巴黎人酒店、澳門百利宮酒店、澳門四季酒店及澳門金沙酒店的營運。新加坡部分包括濱海灣金沙。該公司由 Sheldon Gary Adelson 於 2004 年 8 月創立，總部位於內華達州拉斯維加斯。

info.description: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in providing financial planning, asset management, and insurance services to individuals, businesses, and institutions. It operates through the following business segments: Advice & Wealth Management, Asset Management, Retirement & Protection Solutions, and Corporate & Other. The Advice & Wealth Management segment consists of financial planning and advice, as well as full-service brokerage services for retail clients through financial advisors. The Asset Management segment offers investment management, advice, and products to retail, high net worth, and institutional clients through Columbia Threadneedle. The Retirement & Protection Solutions segment refers to RiverSource solutions, which includes clients annuities, life insurance, and disability income insurance products. The Corporate & Other segment handles closed blocks of business and net investment income or loss on corporate level assets, including excess capital held in subsidiaries. The company was founded by John Tappan in 1894 and is headquartered in Minneapolis, MN.
info.description_zh: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. 是一家控股公司，致力於為個人、企業和機構提供財務規劃、資產管理和保險服務。該公司透過以下業務部門運作：諮詢與財富管理、資產管理、退休與保障解決方案以及企業與其他。建議和財富管理部門包括財務規劃和建議，以及透過財務顧問為零售客戶提供全方位經紀服務。資產管理部門透過 Columbia Threadneedle 向零售、高淨值和機構客戶提供投資管理、建議和產品。退休和保障解決方案部門是指 RiverSource 解決方案，其中包括客戶年金、人壽保險和殘障收入保險產品。本公司及其他部門處理封閉的業務區塊以及公司級資產的淨投資收入或損失，包括子公司持有的超額資本。該公司由 John Tappan 於 1894 年創立，總部位於明尼蘇達州明尼阿波利斯。

info.description: Autodesk, Inc. engages in the design of software and services. Its products include AutoCAD, BIM Collaborate Pro, Revit, Civil 3D, Fusion 360, InfraWorks, Inventor, Maya, PlanGrid, Revit, Shotgun, and 3ds Max. The firm also offers product development and manufacturing software, which provides manufacturers in the automotive, transportation, industrial machinery, consumer products, and building product industries with digital design, engineering, and production solutions. The firm is also involved in digital media and entertainment, which consists of tools for digital sculpting, modeling, animation, effects, rendering, and compositing for design visualization, visual effects, and games production. The company was founded by John Walker in April 1982 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Autodesk, Inc. 從事軟體和服務設計。其產品包括 AutoCAD、BIM Collaborate Pro、Revit、Civil 3D、Fusion 360、InfraWorks、Inventor、Maya、PlanGrid、Revit、Shotgun 和 3ds Max。該公司還提供產品開發和製造軟體，為汽車、運輸、工業機械、消費品和建築產品行業的製造商提供數位設計、工程和生產解決方案。該公司還涉足數位媒體和娛樂領域，其中包括用於設計視覺化、視覺效果和遊戲製作的數位雕刻、建模、動畫、效果、渲染和合成工具。該公司由 John Walker 於 1982 年 4 月創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Palantir Technologies, Inc. engages in the business of building and deploying software platforms that serve as the central operating systems for its customers. It operates through the Commercial and Government segments. The Commercial segment focuses on customers working in non-government industries. The Government segment is involved in providing services to customers that are the United States government and non-United States government agencies. Its platforms are widely used in areas such as defense, intelligence, healthcare, energy, and financial services, supporting data integration, large-scale analytics, and operational decision-making. The company was founded by Alexander Ceadmon Karp, Peter Andreas Thiel, Stephen Cohen, Joseph Lonsdale, and Nathan Dale Gettings in 2003 and is headquartered in Aventura, FL.
info.description_zh: Palantir Technologies, Inc. 從事建置和部署作為客戶中央作業系統的軟體平台的業務。它透過商業和政府部門運作。商業部門專注於非政府產業的客戶。政府部門為美國政府和非美國政府機構的客戶提供服務。其平台廣泛應用於國防、情報、醫療保健、能源和金融服務等領域，支援數據整合、大規模分析和營運決策。該公司由 Alexander Ceadmon Karp、Peter Andreas Thiel、Stephen Cohen、Joseph Lonsdale 和 Nathan Dale Gettings 於 2003 年創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州阿文圖拉。

info.description: Salesforce, Inc. engages in the design and development of cloud-based enterprise software for customer relationship management. Its solutions include sales force automation, customer service and support, marketing automation, digital commerce, community management, collaboration, industry-specific solutions, and salesforce platform. The firm also provides guidance, support, training, and advisory services. The company was founded by Marc Russell Benioff and Parker Harris in 1999 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Salesforce, Inc. 從事用於客戶關係管理的基於雲端的企業軟體的設計和開發。其解決方案包括銷售團隊自動化、客戶服務和支援、行銷自動化、數位商務、社群管理、協作、行業特定解決方案和銷售團隊平台。該公司還提供指導、支援、培訓和諮詢服務。該公司由 Marc Russell Benioff 和 Parker Harris 於 1999 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Invesco Ltd. engages in the investment management business. Its products include mutual funds, unit trusts, exchange-traded funds, closed-end funds, and retirement plans. The company was founded in December 1935 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Invesco Ltd.從事投資管理業務。其產品包括共同基金、單位信託、交易所交易基金、封閉式基金和退休計畫。該公司成立於 1935 年 12 月，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: ServiceNow, Inc. engages in the provision of an end-to-end workflow automation platform for digital businesses. Its Now Platform is a cloud-based solution embedded with artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML). The company was founded by Frederic B. Luddy in June 2004 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
info.description_zh: ServiceNow, Inc. 致力於為數位企業提供端到端工作流程自動化平台。其 Now 平台是一個基於雲端的解決方案，嵌入了人工智慧 (AI) 和機器學習 (ML)。該公司由 Frederic B. Luddy 於 2004 年 6 月創立，總部位於加州聖克拉拉。

info.description: Quest Diagnostics, Inc. engages in the provision of diagnostic testing, information, and services. It operates through the Diagnostic Information Services (DIS) and All Other segments. The DIS segment offers diagnostic information services to physicians, hospitals, patients, and consumers. The All Other segment consists of risk assessment services and healthcare information technology. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Secaucus, NJ.
info.description_zh: Quest Diagnostics, Inc. 從事提供診斷測試、資訊和服務。它透過診斷資訊服務（DIS）和所有其他部門運作。 DIS 部門為醫生、醫院、病患和消費者提供診斷資訊服務。所有其他部門包括風險評估服務和醫療保健資訊科技。該公司成立於 1967 年，總部位於新澤西州錫考克斯。

info.description: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. engages in the provision of power and hand tools, and related accessories, products, services and equipment for oil and gas, infrastructure applications, commercial electronic security and monitoring systems, healthcare solutions, and mechanical access solutions. It operates through the Tools and Outdoor and Industrial segments. The Tools and Outdoor segment refers to power tools, hand tools, accessories and storage, and outdoor power equipment product lines. The Industrial segment includes the engineered fastening and infrastructure businesses. The company was founded by Frederick T. Stanley in 1843 and is headquartered in New Britain, CT.
info.description_zh: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. 從事為石油和天然氣、基礎設施應用、商業電子安全和監控系統、醫療保健解決方案和機械通道解決方案提供電動和手動工具以及相關配件、產品、服務和設備。它透過工具、戶外和工業部門運作。工具和戶外部門涉及電動工具、手動工具、配件和儲存以及戶外動力設備產品線。工業部門包括工程緊固和基礎設施業務。該公司由 Frederick T. Stanley 於 1843 年創立，總部位於康乃狄克州新不列顛。

info.description: Charter Communications, Inc. engages in providing broadband communications services. Its services include Spectrum TV, Spectrum Internet, and Spectrum Voice. It offers business-to-business Internet access, data networking, business telephone, video and music entertainment services, and wireless backhaul. Its advertising sales division, Spectrum Reach, offers local, regional, and national businesses the opportunity to advertise in individual and multiple service areas on cable television networks and advanced advertising platforms. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Stamford, CT.
info.description_zh: Charter Communications, Inc. 從事提供寬頻通訊服務。其服務包括Spectrum TV、Spectrum Internet 和Spectrum Voice。它提供企業對企業網路存取、數據網路、商務電話、視訊和音樂娛樂服務以及無線回程。其廣告銷售部門 Spectrum Reach 為本地、區域和國家企業提供在有線電視網絡和先進廣告平台上的單一和多個服務區域做廣告的機會。該公司成立於 1993 年，總部位於康乃狄克州斯坦福。

info.description: Henry Schein, Inc. engages in the provision of health care products and services to medical, dental, and veterinary office-based practitioners. It operates through the Healthcare Distribution and Technology and Value-Added Services segments. The Healthcare Distribution segment includes consumable products, laboratory, small and large equipment repair services, branded and generic pharmaceuticals, vaccines, surgical, diagnostic tests, infection-control products, and vitamins. The Technology and Value-Added Services segment offers financial on a non-recourse basis, network, and hardware services. The company was founded by Henry Schein and Esther Schein in 1932 and is headquartered in Melville, NY.
info.description_zh: Henry Schein, Inc. 致力於為醫療、牙科和獸醫診所的從業人員提供醫療保健產品和服務。它透過醫療保健分銷、技術和增值服務部門運作。醫療保健分銷部門包括消耗品、實驗室、小型和大型設備維修服務、品牌和仿製藥、疫苗、外科、診斷測試、感染控制產品和維生素。科技和增值服務部門提供無追索權的財務、網路和硬體服務。該公司由 Henry Schein 和 Esther Schein 於 1932 年創立，總部位於紐約州梅爾維爾。

info.description: Tesla, Inc. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of electric vehicles and energy generation and storage systems. It operates through the Automotive and Energy Generation and Storage segments. The Automotive segment includes the design, development, manufacture, sale, and lease of electric vehicles as well as sales of automotive regulatory credits. The Energy Generation and Storage segment is involved in the design, manufacture, installation, sale, and lease of solar energy generation, energy storage products, and related services and sales of solar energy systems incentives. The company was founded by Jeffrey B. Straubel, Elon Reeve Musk, Martin Eberhard, and Marc Tarpenning on July 1, 2003 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: Tesla, Inc. 從事電動車以及能源產生和儲存系統的設計、開發、製造和銷售。它透過汽車、能源生產和儲存部門運作。汽車部門包括電動車的設計、開發、製造、銷售和租賃以及汽車監管積分的銷售。能源發電和儲存部門從事太陽能發電、儲能產品的設計、製造、安裝、銷售和租賃，以及太陽能係統激勵措施的相關服務和銷售。該公司由 Jeffrey B. Straubel、Elon Reeve Musk、Martin Eberhard 和 Marc Tarpenning 於 2003 年 7 月 1 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: Snap-On, Inc. engages in the manufacture and marketing of tools, equipment, diagnostics, repair information, and systems solutions for professional users performing critical tasks. Its products and services include hand and power tools, tool storage, diagnostics software, handheld and PC-based diagnostic products, information and management systems, shop equipment and other solutions for vehicle dealerships and repair centers, as well as for customers in industries such as aviation and aerospace, agriculture, construction, government and military, mining, natural resources, power generation, and technical education. It operates through the following segments: Commercial and Industrial Group, Snap-On Tools Group, Repair Systems and Information Group, and Financial Services. The Commercial and Industrial Group segment consists of business operations that serve the aerospace, natural resources, government, power generation, transportation, and technical education markets. The Snap-On Tools Group segment includes business operations primarily serving vehicle service and repair technicians through its worldwide mobile tool distribution channel. The Repair System and Information Group segment serves professional vehicle repair customers, primarily owners and managers of independent repair shops and original equipment manufacturer dealerships through direct and distributor channels. The Financial Services segment consists of installment sales and lease contracts arising from franchisees' customers, and business loans and vehicle leases to franchisees. The company was founded by Joseph Johnson and William Seidemann in 1920 and is headquartered in Kenosha, WI.
info.description_zh: Snap-On, Inc. 致力於為執行關鍵任務的專業使用者製造和行銷工具、設備、診斷、維修資訊和系統解決方案。其產品和服務包括手動和電動工具、工具儲存、診斷軟體、手持式和基於PC的診斷產品、資訊和管理系統、車間設備和其他解決方案，面向汽車經銷商和維修中心，以及航空航天、農業、建築、政府和軍事、採礦、自然資源、發電和技術教育等行業的客戶。該公司透過以下部門運作：商業和工業部門、實耐寶工具部門、維修系統和資訊部門以及金融服務部門。商業和工業集團部門包括服務於航空航太、自然資源、政府、發電、運輸和技術教育市場的業務運作。實耐寶工具集團業務部門主要透過其全球行動工具分銷管道為車輛服務和維修技術人員提供服務。維修系統和資訊集團部門透過直接和分銷管道為專業車輛維修客戶提供服務，主要是獨立維修店和原始設備製造商經銷商的所有者和經理。金融服務部門包括特許經營商客戶產生的分期銷售和租賃合同，以及向特許經營商提供的商業貸款和車輛租賃。該公司由 Joseph Johnson 和 William Seidemann 於 1920 年創立，總部位於威斯康辛州基諾沙。

info.description: Camden Property Trust engages in the provision of ownership, management, development, reposition, redevelopment, acquisition, and construction of multifamily apartment communities. It focuses on investing in markets characterized by high-growth economic conditions, strong employment, and attractive quality of life. The company was founded by Richard J. Campo and D. Keith Oden on May 25, 1993 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 住宅
info.description_zh: 卡姆登房地產信託公司從事提供多戶公寓社區的所有權、管理、開發、重新定位、再開發、收購和建設。它重點投資於經濟高速成長、就業強勁和生活品質有吸引力的市場。該公司由 Richard J. Campo 和 D. Keith Oden 於 1993 年 5 月 25 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Lowe's Companies, Inc. engages in the retail sale of home improvement products. The firm offers products for maintenance, repair, remodeling, home decorating, and property maintenance. It also provides home improvement products in the following categories: appliances, seasonal & outdoor living, lumber, lawn & garden, kitchens & bath, hardware, building materials, millwork, paint, rough plumbing, tools, electrical, flooring, and decor. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Mooresville, NC.
info.description_zh: Lowe's Companies, Inc. 從事家居裝修產品的零售業務。該公司提供用於維護、修理、改造、家居裝飾和物業維護的產品。它還提供以下類別的家居裝修產品：電器、季節性和戶外生活、木材、草坪和花園、廚房和浴室、五金、建築材料、木製品、油漆、粗糙管道、工具、電氣、地板和裝飾。該公司成立於 1946 年，總部位於北卡羅來納州穆爾斯維爾。

info.description: Baxter International, Inc. engages in the provision of a portfolio of essential healthcare products including acute and chronic dialysis therapies, sterile intravenous (IV) solutions, infusion systems and devices, parenteral nutrition therapies, inhaled anesthetics, generic injectable pharmaceuticals, surgical hemostat and sealant products, surgical equipment, smart bed systems, patient monitoring and diagnostic technologies, and respiratory health devices. It operates through the following segments: Medical Products and Therapies, Healthcare Systems and Technologies, and Pharmaceuticals. The Medical Products and Therapies segment includes sales of sterile IV solutions, infusion systems, administration sets, parenteral nutrition therapies and surgical hemostat, sealant, and adhesion prevention products. The Healthcare Systems and Technologies segment sells connected care solutions and collaboration tools, including smart bed systems, patient monitoring systems and diagnostic technologies, respiratory health devices and advanced equipment for the surgical space, including operating room integration technologies, precision positioning devices, and other accessories. The Pharmaceuticals segment focuses on the sales of specialty injectable pharmaceuticals, inhaled anesthetics, and drug compounding services. The company was founded by Davis Baxter in 1931 and is headquartered in Deerfield, IL.
info.description_zh: Baxter International, Inc. 從事提供一系列基本醫療保健產品，包括急性和慢性透析療法、無菌靜脈 (IV) 解決方案、輸液系統和設備、腸外營養療法、吸入麻醉劑、非專利注射藥物、手術止血劑和密封劑產品、手術設備、智慧床系統、患者監測和診斷技術以及呼吸健康設備。它透過以下部門運作：醫療產品和療法、醫療保健系統和技術以及製藥。醫療產品和治療部門包括銷售無菌靜脈注射溶液、輸液系統、給藥裝置、腸外營養療法和手術止血劑、密封劑和預防沾黏產品。醫療保健系統和技術部門銷售互聯護理解決方案和協作工具，包括智慧床系統、病患監護系統和診斷技術、呼吸健康設備和手術空間的先進設備，包括手術室整合技術、精密定位設備和其他配件。藥品部門專注於特種注射藥品、吸入麻醉劑和藥物配製服務的銷售。該公司由 Davis Baxter 於 1931 年創立，總部位於伊利諾伊州迪爾菲爾德。

info.description: Uber Technologies, Inc. is a technology platform, which engages in the development and operation of technology applications, networks, and product to power movement from point A to point B. The firm offers ride services and merchants delivery service providers for meal preparation, grocery, and other delivery services. It operates through the following segments: Mobility, Delivery, and Freight. The Mobility segment refers to products that connect consumers with mobility drivers who provide rides in a variety of vehicles, such as cars, auto rickshaws, motorbikes, minibuses, and taxis. The Delivery segment offers consumers the chance to search for and discover local restaurants, order a meal, and either pick-up at the restaurant or have the meal delivered. The Freight segment focuses on connecting carriers with shippers on its platform, and gives carriers upfront, transparent pricing, and the ability to book a shipment. The company was founded by Oscar Salazar Gaitan, Travis Kalanick, and Garrett Camp in 2009 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Uber Technologies, Inc.是一家技術平台，從事技術應用程式、網路和產品的開發和運營，以推動從A點到B點的移動。該公司提供乘車服務和商家送貨服務提供商，提供膳食準備、雜貨和其他送貨服務。它透過以下部門運作：移動、交付和貨運。移動出行領域是指將消費者與移動司機聯繫起來的產品，這些司機提供各種車輛的乘車服務，例如汽車、人力車、摩托車、小巴和計程車。外賣部分為消費者提供了搜尋和發現當地餐廳、訂餐以及在餐廳取餐或送貨上門的機會。貨運部門專注於在其平台上連接承運商與托運人，並為承運商提供預付款、透明的定價以及預訂貨運的能力。該公司由 Oscar Salazar Gaitan、Travis Kalanick 和 Garrett Camp 於 2009 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Wynn Resorts Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the design, development, and operation of destination casino resorts. It operates through the following segments: Wynn Palace, Wynn Macau, Las Vegas Operations, Encore Boston Harbor, and Corporate and Other. The company was founded by Stephen Alan Wynn, Elaine P. Wynn, and Kazuo Okada in 2002 and is headquartered in Las Vegas, NV.
info.description_zh: 永利度假村有限公司是一家控股公司，從事目的地賭場度假村的設計、開發和營運。該公司透過以下部門運作：永利皇宮部門、永利澳門部門、拉斯維加斯業務部門、安可波士頓港部門以及企業及其他部門。該公司由 Stephen Alan Wynn、Elaine P. Wynn 和 Kazuo Okada 於 2002 年創立，總部位於內華達州拉斯維加斯。

info.description: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. engages in the provision of trading and investment solutions to investors. It operates through the following business segments: Options, North American Equities, Futures, Europe and Asia Pacific, Global FX, and Digital. The Options segment includes the options exchange business, which lists trading options on market indexes and on non-exclusive multiply listed options. The North American Equities segment covers listed cash equities and ETP transaction services that occur on BZX, BYX, EDGX, and EDGA. The Futures segment refers to the business of futures exchange, CFE, which includes offering for trading futures on the VIX Index and bitcoin and other futures products. The Europe and Asia Pacific segment relates to the pan-European listed cash equities transaction services, ETPs, exchange-traded commodities, and international depository receipts that occur on the RIE, operated by Cboe Europe Equities. The Global FX segment represents the institutional FX trading services that occur on the Cboe FX platform. The Digital segment focuses on Cboe Digital, which operates a digital asset spot market and a regulated futures exchange. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. 致力於為投資者提供交易和投資解決方案。該公司透過以下業務部門運作：選擇權、北美股票、期貨、歐洲和亞太地區、全球外匯和數位。選擇權部門包括選擇權交易業務，該業務列出市場指數和非獨家多重上市選擇權的交易選擇權。北美股票部門涵蓋 BZX、BYX、EDGX 和 EDGA 上發生的上市現金股票和 ETP 交易服務。期貨業務是指期貨交易所（CFE）的業務，包括提供 VIX 指數和比特幣及其他期貨產品的期貨交易。歐洲和亞太分部涉及泛歐上市現金股票交易服務、ETP、交易所交易商品以及 RIE 上發生的國際存託憑證，由 Cboe Europe Equities 營運。全球外匯部分代表芝加哥期權交易所外匯平台上發生的機構外匯交易服務。數位部門專注於 Cboe Digital，該公司經營數位資產現貨市場和受監管的期貨交易所。該公司成立於 1973 年，總部位於伊利諾伊州芝加哥。

info.description: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners plc engages in the distribution and sale of non-alcoholic ready-to-drink beverages. It operates through the following geographical segments: Iberia, Germany, Great Britain, France, Belgium and Luxembourg, Netherlands, Norway, Sweden, and Iceland. The Iberia segment refers to Spain, Portugal, and Andorra. The France segment includes continental France and Monaco. The company was founded on August 4, 2015 and is headquartered in Uxbridge, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: 可口可樂歐洲太平洋合作夥伴有限公司從事非酒精即飲飲料的經銷和銷售。該公司透過以下地理區域開展業務：伊比利亞半島、德國、英國、法國、比利時和盧森堡、荷蘭、挪威、瑞典和冰島。伊比利亞航段指西班牙、葡萄牙和安道爾。法國部分包括法國本土和摩納哥。該公司成立於2015年8月4日，總部位於英國烏克斯布里奇。

info.description: HP Inc. is an information technology company, which engages in the provision of personal computing and other access devices, imaging and printing products, and related technologies, solutions, and services. It operates through the following segments: Personal Systems, Printing, and Corporate Investments. The Personal Systems segment offers commercial and consumer desktop and notebook personal computers, workstations, thin clients, commercial tablets and mobility devices, retail point-of-sale systems, displays and other related accessories, software, support, and services for the commercial and consumer markets. The Printing segment provides consumer and commercial printer hardware, supplies, solutions and services, and scanning devices. The Corporate Investments segment includes HP Labs and certain business incubation projects. The company was founded by William R. Hewlett and David Packard in 1939 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: 惠普公司是一家資訊科技公司，從事提供個人運算和其他存取設備、影像和列印產品以及相關技術、解決方案和服務。它透過以下部門運作：個人系統、印刷和企業投資。個人系統部門為商業和消費市場提供商業和消費桌上型和筆記型個人電腦、工作站、瘦客戶端、商用平板電腦和行動裝置、零售銷售點系統、顯示器和其他相關配件、軟體、支援和服務。列印部門提供消費者和商業印表機硬體、耗材、解決方案和服務以及掃描設備。企業投資部門包括惠普實驗室和某些企業孵化項目。該公司由 William R. Hewlett 和 David Packard 於 1939 年創立，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. is a real estate investment trust, which engages in the operation, acquisition, and development of apartment communities. It operates through the Same Store and Non-Same Store segments. The Same Store Communities segment represents those apartment communities that have been owned and stabilized for at least 12 months as of the first day of the calendar year. The Non-Same Store segment includes recent acquisitions, communities in development or lease-up. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Germantown, TN.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 住宅
info.description_zh: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc.是一家房地產投資信託公司，從事公寓社區的營運、收購和開發。它透過同一商店和非同一商店部分進行運作。同商店社區部分代表截至日曆年第一天已擁有並穩定至少 12 個月的公寓社區。非同一商店部分包括最近的收購、正在開發或租賃的社區。該公司成立於 1994 年，總部位於田納西州日耳曼敦。

info.description: Marsh & McLennan Cos., Inc. is a professional services firm, which engages in offering clients advice and solutions to risk, strategy, and people. It operates through the Risk and Insurance Services and Consulting segments. The Risk and Insurance Services segment is involved in risk management activities, as well as insurance and reinsurance broking and services. The Consulting segment offers health, wealth, and career solutions and products, and specialized management, strategic, economic, and brand consulting services. The company was founded by Henry W. Marsh and Donald R. McLennan in 1871 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Marsh & McLennan Cos., Inc. 是一家專業服務公司，致力於為客戶提供有關風險、策略和人員的建議和解決方案。它透過風險和保險服務及諮詢部門運作。風險和保險服務部門從事風險管理活動以及保險和再保險經紀和服務。諮詢部門提供健康、財富和職業解決方案和產品，以及專業管理、策略、經濟和品牌諮詢服務。該公司由 Henry W. Marsh 和 Donald R. McLennan 於 1871 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Thomson Reuters Corp. engages in the provision of news and information for professional markets. It operates through the following segments: Legal Professionals, Corporates, Tax and Accounting Professionals, Reuters News, and Global Print. The Legal Professionals segment provides research and workflow products to law firms and government. The Corporates segment serves corporate customers with full suite of content-enabled technology solutions for in-house legal, tax, regulatory, compliance, and information technology professionals. The Tax and Accounting Professionals segment offers research and workflow products focusing on intuitive tax offerings and automating tax workflows to tax, accounting, and audit professional in accounting firms. The Reuters News segment supplies business, financial, national, and international news to professionals via desktop terminals. The Global Print segment offers legal and tax information primarily in print format to customers around the world. The company was founded in 1799 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
info.description_zh: 湯森路透公司致力於為專業市場提供新聞和資訊。該公司透過以下部門營運：法律專業部門、企業部門、稅務和會計專業部門、路透社新聞部門和全球印刷部門。法律專業人員部門向律師事務所和政府提供研究和工作流程產品。企業部門為企業客戶提供全套內容支援的技術解決方案，供內部法律、稅務、監管、合規和資訊科技專業人員使用。稅務和會計專業人士部門為會計師事務所的稅務、會計和審計專業人士提供研究和工作流程產品，並專注於直觀的稅務產品和自動化稅務工作流程。路透社新聞部門透過桌面終端向專業人士提供商業、金融、國內和國際新聞。全球印刷部門主要以印刷形式向世界各地的客戶提供法律和稅務資訊。該公司成立於1799年，總部位於加拿大多倫多。

info.description: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. engages in the provision of space for lease. It offers properties for rent to life science, agriculture technology (agtech), and technology tenants. The company was founded by Alan D. Gold, Gary A. Kreitzer, Joel S. Marcus, and Jerry M. Sudarsky in October 1994 and is headquartered in Pasadena, CA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 辦公室
info.description_zh: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. 從事提供租賃空間的業務。它為生命科學、農業技術 (agtech) 和技術租戶提供出租物業。該公司由 Alan D. Gold、Gary A. Kreitzer、Joel S. Marcus 和 Jerry M. Sudarsky 於 1994 年 10 月創立，總部位於加州帕薩迪納。

info.description: NVR, Inc. engages in the construction and sale of single-family detached homes, townhomes, and condominium buildings. It operates through the following geographical segments: Mid Atlantic, North East, Mid East, and South East. The Mid Atlantic segment includes Maryland, Virginia, West Virginia, Delaware, and Washington, D.C. The North East segment pertains to New Jersey and Eastern Pennsylvania. The Mid East segment refers to New York, Ohio, Western Pennsylvania, Indiana, and Illinois. The South East segment consists of North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee, Florida, Georgia, and Kentucky. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Reston, VA.
info.description_zh: NVR, Inc. 從事單戶獨立住宅、連棟房屋和公寓大樓的建設和銷售。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：大西洋中部、東北部、中東和東南部。大西洋中部航段包括馬裡蘭州、維吉尼亞州、西維吉尼亞州、德拉瓦州和華盛頓特區。東北航段涉及新澤西州和賓夕法尼亞州東部。中東部分是指紐約州、俄亥俄州、賓州西部、印第安納州和伊利諾州。東南部部分包括北卡羅來納州、南卡羅來納州、田納西州、佛羅裡達州、喬治亞州和肯塔基州。該公司成立於 1980 年，總部位於維吉尼亞州雷斯頓。

info.description: 3M Co. is a technology company, which manufactures industrial, safety, and consumer products. It operates through the following segments: Safety and Industrial, Transportation and Electronics, Health Care, Consumer, and Corporate and Other. The Safety and Industrial segment consists of personal safety, industrial adhesives and tapes, abrasives, closure and masking systems, electrical markets, automotive aftermarket, and roofing granules. The Transportation and Electronics segment includes electronics, automotive and aerospace, commercial solutions, advanced materials, and transportation safety. The Health Care segment offers medical and surgical supplies, skin health and infection prevention products, oral care solutions, separation and purification sciences, health information systems, inhalation and transdermal drug delivery systems, and food safety products. The Consumer segment covers consumer healthcare, home care, home improvement, and stationery and office products, such as consumer bandages, braces, supports, respirators, cleaning products, retail abrasives, picture hanging, and consumer air quality solutions. The Corporate and Other segment refers to special items and other corporate expenses. The company was founded by Henry S. Bryan, Hermon W. Cable, John Dwan, William A. McGonagle, and J. Danley Budd in 1902 and is headquartered in St. Paul, MN.
info.description_zh: 3M Co. 是一家生產工業、安全和消費品的科技公司。它透過以下部門運作：安全和工業部門、運輸和電子部門、醫療保健部門、消費者部門以及企業和其他部門。安全和工業部門包括個人安全、工業黏合劑和膠帶、磨料、封閉和遮蔽系統、電氣市場、汽車售後市場和屋頂顆粒。運輸和電子部門包括電子、汽車和航空航太、商業解決方案、先進材料和運輸安全。醫療保健部門提供醫療和外科用品、皮膚健康和感染預防產品、口腔護理解決方案、分離和純化科學、健康資訊系統、吸入和透皮給藥系統以及食品安全產品。消費者細分市場涵蓋消費者醫療保健、家庭護理、家居裝修以及文具和辦公產品，例如消費者繃帶、支架、支架、呼吸器、清潔產品、零售磨料、掛畫和消費者空氣品質解決方案。公司和其他部門是指特殊項目和其他公司費用。該公司由 Henry S. Bryan、Hermon W. Cable、John Dwan、William A. McGonagle 和 J. Danley Budd 於 1902 年創立，總部位於明尼蘇達州聖保羅。

info.description: International Flavors & Fragrances, Inc. engages in the manufacture and supply of flavors and fragrances used in the food, beverage, personal care, and household products industries. It operates through the following segments: Nourish, Health & Biosciences, Scent and Pharma Solutions. The Nourish segment consists of legacy Taste segment combined with N&B's Food & Beverage division and the food protection business of N&B's Health & Biosciences division. The Health & Biosciences business consists of a biotechnology-driven portfolio of enzymes, food cultures, probiotics and specialty ingredients for food, home and personal care, and health and wellness applications. The Scent business creates fragrance compounds, fragrance ingredients and cosmetic ingredients that are integral elements in the world's finest perfumes and best-known household and personal care products. The Pharma Solutions business produces a vast portfolio including cellulosics and seaweed-based pharma excipients, used to improve the functionality and delivery of active pharmaceutical ingredients, including controlled or modified drug release formulations, and enabling. The company was founded in 1833 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: International Flavors & Fragrances, Inc. 從事食品、飲料、個人護理和家居用品行業使用的香精香料的製造和供應。該公司透過以下部門運作：滋養部門、健康與生物科學部門、香味部門和製藥解決方案部門。營養部門由傳統口味部門、N&B 食品和飲料部門以及 N&B 健康與生物科學部門的食品保護業務組成。健康與生物科學業務包括生物技術驅動的酵素、食品培養物、益生菌和食品、家庭和個人護理以及健康和保健應用的特殊成分組合。香精業務生產香精化合物、香精成分和化妝品成分，這些是世界上最好的香水和最著名的家居和個人護理產品中不可或缺的元素。製藥解決方案業務生產廣泛的產品組合，包括纖維素和海藻基藥用輔料，用於改善活性藥物成分的功能和輸送，包括受控或改良的藥物釋放配方，並實現。該公司成立於 1833 年，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Tapestry, Inc. engages in the provision of luxury accessories and lifestyle brands. It operates through the following segments: Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman. The Coach segment consists of global sales of Coach brand products to customers through Coach operated stores, including the internet and concession shop-in-shops, and sales to wholesale customers, and through independent third-party distributors. The Kate Spade segment focuses on Kate Spade New York brand products to customers through Kate Spade operated stores, including the Internet, sales to wholesale customers, through concession shop-in-shops and through independent third-party distributors. The Stuart Weitzman segment includes Stuart Weitzman brand products primarily through Stuart Weitzman operated stores. The company was founded by Dawn Hughes in 1941 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Tapestry, Inc. 從事提供奢華配件和生活風格品牌。它透過以下部門運作：Coach、Kate Spade 和 Stuart Weitzman。 Coach 部門包括透過 Coach 經營的商店（包括網路和特許店中店）向全球客戶銷售 Coach 品牌產品，以及透過獨立第三方經銷商向批發客戶銷售。 Kate Spade 部門專注於透過 Kate Spade 經營的商店（包括網路）向顧客銷售 Kate Spade New York 品牌產品，透過特許店中店和獨立第三方經銷商向批發客戶銷售。 Stuart Weitzman 部門主要透過 Stuart Weitzman 經營的商店提供 Stuart Weitzman 品牌產品。該公司由 Dawn Hughes 於 1941 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Hasbro, Inc. engages in the provision of children and family leisure time products and services with a portfolio of brands and entertainment properties. The firm's brands of toys include Power Rangers, Magic: The Gathering, Monopoly, My Little Pony, Nerf, Play-Doh and Transformers. It operates through the following segments: Consumer Products, Wizards of the Coast and Digital Gaming, Entertainment, and Corporate and Other. The Consumer Products segment markets and sells toys and game products around the world. It also promotes brands through the out-licensing of trademarks, characters and other brand and intellectual property rights to third parties, and through the sale of branded consumer products such as toys and apparel. The Wizards of the Coast and Digital Gaming segment promotes the company's brands through the development of trading cards, role-playing and digital game experiences based on Hasbro and Wizards of the Coast properties. The Entertainment segment develops and distributes entertainment content including film, scripted and unscripted television, children's programming, digital content, and live entertainment. The Corporate and Other segment includes the management and administrative services to its principal reporting segments. The company was founded by Henry Hassenfeld and Hilal Hassenfeld in 1923 and is headquartered in Pawtucket, RI.
info.description_zh: Hasbro, Inc. 致力於提供兒童和家庭休閒產品和服務，擁有一系列品牌和娛樂資產。該公司的玩具品牌包括《Power Rangers》、《Magic: The Gathering》、《Monopoly》、《My Little Pony》、《Nerf》、《Play-Doh》和《Transformers》。該公司透過以下部門運作：消費品部門、海岸奇才部門、數位遊戲部門、娛樂部門以及企業及其他部門。消費品部門在世界各地行銷和銷售玩具和遊戲產品。它還透過將商標、人物和其他品牌及智慧財產權授權給第三方，以及透過銷售玩具和服裝等品牌消費品來推廣品牌。 Wizards of the Coast 和數位遊戲部門透過基於 Hasbro 和 Wizards of the Coast 資產開發交易卡、角色扮演和數位遊戲體驗來推廣公司的品牌。娛樂部門開發和發行娛樂內容，包括電影、有劇本和無劇本電視、兒童節目、數位內容和現場娛樂。公司及其他部門包括為其主要報告部門提供管理和行政服務。該公司由 Henry Hassenfeld 和 Hilal Hassenfeld 於 1923 年創立，總部位於羅德島州波塔基特。

info.description: Smurfit WestRock Plc engages in the development and provision of packaging solutions. Its products include corrugated packaging, corrugated sheet boards, hexacomb packaging, and solid boards. The company was founded on July 6, 2017 and is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland.
info.description_zh: Smurfit WestRock Plc 從事包裝解決方案的開發和提供。其產品包括瓦楞包裝、瓦楞紙板、六格包裝和實心紙板。該公司成立於2017年7月6日，總部位於愛爾蘭都柏林。

info.description: Southwest Airlines Co. engages in the operation and management of a passenger airline. The firm also offers ancillary services such as early bird check-in, upgraded boarding, and transportation of pets and unaccompanied minors. It operates in the United States, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, Mexico, Jamaica, the Bahamas, Aruba, Dominican Republic, Costa Rica, Belize, Cuba, the Cayman Islands, and Turks and Caicos. The company was founded by Rollin W. King and Herbert D. Kelleher on March 9, 1967 and is headquartered in Dallas, TX.
info.description_zh: 西南航空有限公司從事客運航空公司的經營和管理。該公司還提供輔助服務，例如提前辦理登機手續、升級登機以及寵物和無人陪伴的未成年人的運輸。它在美國、波多黎各聯邦、墨西哥、牙買加、巴哈馬、阿魯巴、多明尼加共和國、哥斯達黎加、伯利茲、古巴、開曼群島以及特克斯和凱科斯群島開展業務。該公司由 Rollin W. King 和 Herbert D. Kelleher 於 1967 年 3 月 9 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州達拉斯。

info.description: The Charles Schwab Corp. is a savings and loan holding company, which engages in the provision of wealth management, securities brokerage, banking, asset management, custody, and financial advisory services. It operates through the Investor Services and Advisor Services segments. The Investor Services segment includes retail brokerage, investment advisory, and banking and trust services to individual investors, retirement plan and business services, as well as other corporate brokerage services, to businesses and employees. The Advisor Services segment provides custodial, trading, banking and trust, and support services to independent registered investment advisors, independent retirement advisors, and recordkeepers. The company was founded by Charles Robert Schwab in 1986 and is headquartered in Westlake, TX.
info.description_zh: 嘉信理財公司是一家儲蓄和貸款控股公司，從事提供財富管理、證券經紀、銀行、資產管理、託管和財務諮詢服務。它透過投資者服務和顧問服務部門運作。投資者服務部門包括為個人投資者提供零售經紀、投資諮詢、銀行和信託服務、退休計畫和商業服務，以及為企業和員工提供的其他企業經紀服務。顧問服務部門為獨立註冊投資顧問、獨立退休顧問和記錄保管員提供託管、交易、銀行和信託以及支援服務。該公司由 Charles Robert Schwab 於 1986 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州西湖。

info.description: Equifax, Inc. engages in the provision of information solutions and human resources business process outsourcing services. It operates through the following business segments: U.S. Information Solutions, Workforce Solutions and International. The U.S. Information Solutions segment includes consumer and commercial information services, mortgage loan origination information, financial marketing services, and identity management. The Workforce Solutions segment covers employment, income, and social security number verification services as well as complementary payroll-based transaction and employment tax management services. The International segment offers information, technology, and services to support debt collections and recovery management in Canada, Europe, Latin America and Asia Pacific. The company was founded by Cator Woolford and Guy Woolford in 1899 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Equifax, Inc. 從事提供資訊解決方案和人力資源業務流程外包服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：美國資訊解決方案部門、勞動力解決方案部門和國際部門。美國資訊解決方案部門包括消費者和商業資訊服務、抵押貸款發放資訊、金融行銷服務和身分管理。勞動力解決方案部門涵蓋就業、收入和社會安全號碼驗證服務以及基於工資的補充交易和就業稅管理服務。國際部門提供資訊、技術和服務，以支援加拿大、歐洲、拉丁美洲和亞太地區的債務催收和追收管理。該公司由 Cator Woolford 和 Guy Woolford 於 1899 年創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. provides cybersecurity products and services to stop breaches. It offers cloud-delivered protection across endpoints, cloud workloads, identity and data, and threat intelligence, managed security services, IT operations management, threat hunting, Zero Trust identity protection, and log management. CrowdStrike serves customers worldwide. The company was founded by George P. Kurtz, Gregg Marston, and Dmitri Alperovitch on November 7, 2011 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. 提供網路安全產品和服務來阻止違規行為。它提供跨端點、雲端工作負載、身分和資料以及威脅情報、託管安全服務、IT 營運管理、威脅搜尋、零信任身分保護和日誌管理的雲端交付保護。 CrowdStrike 為全球客戶提供服務。該公司由 George P. Kurtz、Gregg Marston 和 Dmitri Alperovitch 於 2011 年 11 月 7 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. engages in the development, manufacture, and provision of analog and mixed-signal semiconductor products and solutions for applications including aerospace, automotive, broadband, cellular infrastructure, connected home, defense, entertainment and gaming, industrial, medical, smartphone, tablet, and wearables. Its products include amplifiers, attenuators, circulators, demodulators, detectors, diodes, directional couplers, front-end modules, hybrids, isolators, lighting and display solutions, mixers, modulators, optocouplers, opt isolators, phase shifters, synthesizers, power dividers and combiners, receivers, switches, and technical ceramics. The company was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Irvine, CA.
info.description_zh: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. 從事開發、製造和提供模擬和混合信號半導體產品及解決方案，適用於航空航天、汽車、寬頻、蜂窩基礎設施、互聯家庭、國防、娛樂和遊戲、工業、醫療、智慧型手機、平板電腦和穿戴式裝置等應用。其產品包括放大器、衰減器、循環器、解調器、檢測器、二極管、定向耦合器、前端模組、混合器、隔離器、照明和顯示解決方案、混頻器、調製器、光耦合器、光隔離器、移相器、合成器、功率分配器和組合器、接收器、開關和技術陶瓷。該公司成立於 1962 年，總部位於加州歐文。

info.description: Super Micro Computer, Inc. engages in the distribution and manufacture of information technology solutions and other computer products. Its products include twin solutions, MP servers, GPU and coprocessor, MicroCloud, AMD solutions, power supplies, SuperServer, storage, motherboards, chassis, super workstations, accessories, SuperRack and server management products. The company was founded by Charles Liang, Yih-Shyan Liaw, Sara Liu, and Chiu-Chu Liu Liang in September 1993 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Super Micro Computer, Inc. 從事資訊科技解決方案和其他電腦產品的分銷和製造。其產品包括雙解決方案、MP伺服器、GPU和協處理器、MicroCloud、AMD解決方案、電源、SuperServer、儲存、主機板、機箱、超級工作站、配件、SuperRack和伺服器管理產品。該公司由梁朝陽 (Charles Liang)、廖亦賢 (Yih-Shyan Liaw)、梁莎拉 (Sara Liu) 和劉秋珠 (Chiu-Chu Liu Liu) 於 1993 年 9 月創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. engages in the development, publishing, and marketing of interactive software games. Its products are designed for console systems, handheld gaming systems, and personal computers, including smart phones and tablets, and are delivered through physical retail, digital download, online platforms, and cloud streaming services. The company was founded by Ryan A. Brant in 1993 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. 從事互動軟體遊戲的開發、發行和行銷。其產品專為遊戲機系統、手持遊戲系統和個人電腦（包括智慧型手機和平板電腦）而設計，並透過實體零售、數位下載、線上平台和雲端串流服務提供。該公司由 Ryan A. Brant 於 1993 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: MSCI, Inc. engages in the provision of investment decision support tools including indices, portfolio risk and performance analytics and corporate governance products and services. It operates through the following segments: Index, Analytics, ESG and Climate, and All Other-Private Assets. The Index segment focuses on the investment process, including developing indexed financial products. The Analytics segment offers risk management, performance attribution and portfolio management content, applications, and services. The ESG and Climate segment includes providing data, ratings, research, and tools to help investors navigate increasing regulation, meet new client demands and better integrate ESG and climate elements into their investment processes. The All Other-Private Assets segment refers to the business intelligence products to real estate owners, managers, developers, and brokers. The company was founded by Andrew Thomas Rudd in 1998 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: MSCI, Inc. 從事提供投資決策支援工具，包括指數、投資組合風險和績效分析以及公司治理產品和服務。它透過以下部門運作：指數部門、分析部門、ESG 和氣候部門以及所有其他私人資產部門。指數部門專注於投資過程，包括開發指數金融產品。分析部門提供風險管理、績效歸因和投資組合管理內容、應用程式和服務。 ESG 和氣候部門包括提供數據、評級、研究和工具，以幫助投資者應對日益嚴格的監管、滿足新的客戶需求以及更好地將 ESG 和氣候要素融入其投資流程。所有其他私人資產部分是指為房地產所有者、管理者、開發商和經紀人提供的商業智慧產品。該公司由 Andrew Thomas Rudd 於 1998 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Aflac, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of financial protection services. It operates through the following segments: Aflac Japan and Aflac U.S. The Aflac Japan segment offers life insurance, death benefits, and cash surrender values. The Aflac U.S. segment sells voluntary supplemental insurance products for people who already have major medical or primary insurance coverage. The company was founded by John Amos, Paul Amos and William Amos on November 17, 1955 and is headquartered in Columbus, GA.
info.description_zh: Aflac, Inc. 是一家控股公司，從事提供金融保護服務。該公司透過以下部門營運：Aflac Japan 和 Aflac U.S. Aflac Japan 部門提供人壽保險、死亡撫卹金和現金退保價值。 Aflac 美國部門為已經擁有主要醫療或基本保險的人們銷售自願補充保險產品。該公司由約翰·阿莫斯 (John Amos)、保羅·阿莫斯 (Paul Amos) 和威廉·阿莫斯 (William Amos) 於 1955 年 11 月 17 日創立，總部位於喬治亞州哥倫布。

info.description: Zebra Technologies Corp. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of automatic identification and data capture products. Its products include mobile computers, barcode scanners, radio frequency identification devices readers, specialty printers for barcode labeling and personal identification, real-time location systems, accessories and supplies, such as self-adhesive labels and other consumables, and software utilities and applications. It also provides services such as maintenance, technical support, repair, and managed and professional services, including cloud-based subscriptions. It operates through Asset Intelligence and Tracking and Enterprise Visibility and Mobility segments. The Asset Intelligence and Tracking segment is involved in barcode and card printing, location solutions, supplies, and services. The Enterprise Visibility and Mobility segment focuses on mobile computing, data capture, and RFID. The company was founded by Edward L. Kaplan and Gerhard Cless in 1969 and is headquartered in Lincolnshire, IL.
info.description_zh: Zebra Technologies Corp. 從事自動辨識和資料擷取產品的設計、製造和銷售。其產品包括行動數據終端、條碼掃描器、無線射頻識別設備讀取器、條碼標籤和個人識別專用印表機、即時定位系統、配件和耗材（例如不乾膠標籤和其他耗材）以及軟體實用程式和應用程式。它還提供維護、技術支援、維修以及託管和專業服務等服務，包括基於雲端的訂閱。它透過資產智慧和追蹤以及企業可見性和移動性部門進行運作。資產智慧和追蹤部門涉及條碼和卡片列印、定位解決方案、用品和服務。企業可視性和移動性部分專注於行動運算、資料擷取和 RFID。該公司由 Edward L. Kaplan 和 Gerhard Cless 於 1969 年創立，總部位於伊利諾伊州林肯郡。

info.description: BXP, Inc. operates as a real estate investment trust. It develops, acquires, manages and owns a portfolio of Class A properties. The firm operates through the following geographical locations: Boston, New York, San Francisco and Washington. The company was founded by Mortimer Benjamin Zuckerman and Edward H. Linde in 1970 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 辦公室
info.description_zh: BXP, Inc. 以房地產投資信託公司營運。它開發、收購、管理和擁有 A 級物業組合。該公司在以下地理位置開展業務：波士頓、紐約、舊金山和華盛頓。該公司由 Mortimer Benjamin Zuckerman 和 Edward H. Linde 於 1970 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: Walmart, Inc. engages in the retail and wholesale business. The company offers an assortment of merchandise and services at everyday low prices. It operates through the following business segments: Walmart U.S., Walmart International, and Sam's Club. The Walmart U.S. segment operates as a mass merchandiser of consumer products, operating under the Walmart and Walmart Neighborhood Market brands, including walmart.com. The Walmart International segment includes operations of wholly-owned subsidiaries in Canada, Chile, China, and Africa, and majority-owned subsidiaries in India, as well as Mexico and Central America. The Sam's Club segment manages membership-only warehouse clubs and operates samsclub.com. The company was founded by Samuel Moore Walton and James Lawrence Walton on July 2, 1962 and is headquartered in Bentonville, AR.
info.description_zh: 沃爾瑪公司從事零售和批發業務。該公司以每日低價提供各種商品和服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：沃爾瑪美國公司、沃爾瑪國際公司和山姆會員店。沃爾瑪美國部門是一家消費性產品批發商，以沃爾瑪和沃爾瑪鄰里市場品牌經營，包括 walmart.com。沃爾瑪國際部門包括在加拿大、智利、中國和非洲的全資子公司以及在印度、墨西哥和中美洲的控股子公司。山姆會員店部門管理會員制倉儲俱樂部並經營 samsclub.com。該公司由 Samuel Moore Walton 和 James Lawrence Walton 於 1962 年 7 月 2 日創立，總部位於阿肯色州本頓維爾。

info.description: Assurant, Inc. engages in the provision of lifestyle and housing solutions for consumer purchases. It operates through the following segments: Global Lifestyle, Global Housing, and Corporate and Other. The Global Lifestyle segment offers mobile device solutions and extended service products and related services for mobile devices, consumer electronics and appliances, vehicle protection, and related services. The Global Housing segment includes lender-placed homeowners' insurance, lender-placed manufactured housing insurance, lender-placed flood insurance, renters' insurance, and related products, voluntary manufactured housing insurance, voluntary homeowners' insurance and other specialty products. The Corporate and Other segment refers to the corporate employee-related expenses and activities of the holding company. The company was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.industry_zh: 保險 - 財產與意外傷害
info.description_zh: Assurant, Inc. 致力於為消費者購買提供生活方式和住房解決方案。該公司透過以下部門運營：全球生活方式部門、全球住房部門以及企業及其他部門。全球生活風格部門為行動裝置、消費性電子和電器、車輛保護及相關服務提供行動裝置解決方案和擴展服務產品及相關服務。全球住房部門包括貸方放置的房屋保險、貸方放置的製造型房屋保險、貸方放置的洪水保險、租屋者保險及相關產品、自願型製造房屋保險、自願型房屋保險和其他特色產品。公司及其他部門是指控股公司與公司員工相關的費用和活動。該公司成立於 1892 年，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. is a real estate investment trust, which engages in the development, acquisition, ownership, and operation of multifamily communities. It operates through the following segments: Same Store, Other Stabilized, and Development or Redevelopment. The Same Store segment refers to the operating communities that were owned and had stabilized occupancy. The Other Stabilized segment includes all other complete communities that have stabilized occupancy. The Development or Redevelopment segment consists of communities that are under construction. The company was founded by Gilbert M. Meyer in 1978 and is headquartered in Arlington, VA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 住宅
info.description_zh: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. 是一家房地產投資信託公司，從事多戶社區的開發、收購、所有權和營運。它透過以下部門運作：同一商店部門、其他穩定部門以及開發或再開發部門。同店板塊是指自有且入住率穩定的經營社區。其他穩定部分包括所有其他擁有穩定入住率的完整社區。開發或再開發部分由正在建設中的社區組成。該公司由 Gilbert M. Meyer 於 1978 年創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州阿靈頓。

info.description: Adobe, Inc. is a global technology company, which engages in the provision of digital marketing and media solutions. It operates through the following segments: Digital Media, Digital Experience, and Publishing and Advertising. The Digital Media segment offers products and services that enable individuals, teams, businesses, and enterprises to create, publish, and promote content anywhere and accelerate productivity by transforming view, share, engage with and collaborate on documents and creative content. The Digital Experience segment focuses on integrated platform and set of products, services, and solutions that enable businesses to create, manage, execute, measure, monetize, and optimize customer experiences that span from analytics to commerce. The Publishing and Advertising segment includes legacy products and services that address diverse market opportunities, including eLearning solutions, technical document publishing, web conferencing, document and forms platform, web app development, high-end printing, and Adobe Advertising offerings. The company was founded by Charles M. Geschke and John E. Warnock in December 1982 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Adobe, Inc. 是一家全球科技公司，致力於提供數位行銷和媒體解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：數位媒體、數位體驗以及出版和廣告。數位媒體部門提供的產品和服務使個人、團隊、企業和企業能夠在任何地方創建、發布和推廣內容，並透過改變文件和創意內容的視圖、共享、參與和協作來提高生產力。數位體驗部門專注於整合平台和產品、服務和解決方案集，使企業能夠創建、管理、執行、衡量、貨幣化和優化從分析到商業的客戶體驗。出版和廣告部門包括滿足不同市場機會的傳統產品和服務，包括電子學習解決方案、技術文件發布、網路會議、文件和表單平台、網路應用程式開發、高端印刷和 Adob​​e 廣告產品。該公司由 Charles M. Geschke 和 John E. Warnock 於 1982 年 12 月創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: Fortinet, Inc. provides cybersecurity solutions to a variety of businesses, such as enterprises, communication service providers, government organizations, and small to medium-sized businesses. Its product portfolio includes network security, secure access service edge, enterprise networking, security operations, application security, and operational technology. The company was founded by Ken Xie and Michael Xie in October 2000 and is headquartered in Sunnyvale, CA.
info.description_zh: Fortinet, Inc. 為各種企業提供網路安全解決方案，例如企業、通訊服務提供者、政府組織和中小型企業。其產品組合包括網路安全、安全存取服務邊緣、企業網路、安全營運、應用安全和營運技術。該公司由 Ken Xie 和 Michael Xie 於 2000 年 10 月創立，總部位於加州桑尼維爾。

info.description: QUALCOMM, Inc. engages in developing and commercializing foundational technologies and products used in mobile devices and other wireless products. It operates through the following segments: Qualcomm CDMA Technologies (QCT), Qualcomm Technology Licensing (QTL), and Qualcomm Strategic Initiatives (QSI). The QCT segment develops and supplies integrated circuits and system software based on technologies for use in voice and data communications, networking, application processing, multimedia, and global positioning system products. The QTL segment grants licenses and provides rights to use portions of the firm's intellectual property portfolio. The QSI segment focuses on opening new or expanding opportunities for its technologies and supporting the design and introduction of new products and services for voice and data communications. The company was founded by Franklin P. Antonio, Adelia A. Coffman, Andrew Cohen, Klein Gilhousen, Irwin Mark Jacobs, Andrew J. Viterbi, and Harvey P. White in July 1985 and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.
info.description_zh: QUALCOMM, Inc. 致力於行動裝置和其他無線產品中使用的基礎技術和產品的開發和商業化。該公司透過以下部門營運：高通 CDMA 技術部門 (QCT)、高通技術授權部門 (QTL) 和高通策略計畫部門 (QSI)。 QCT 部門開發並提供基於語音和數據通訊、網路、應用處理、多媒體和全球定位系統產品技術的積體電路和系統軟體。 QTL 部門授予許可並提供使用公司部分智慧財產權組合的權利。 QSI 部門專注於為其技術開闢新的或擴大的機會，並支援語音和數據通訊新產品和服務的設計和推出。該公司由 Franklin P. Antonio、Adelia A. Coffman、Andrew Cohen、Klein Gilhousen、Irwin Mark Jacobs、Andrew J. Viterbi 和 Harvey P. White 於 1985 年 7 月創立，總部位於加州聖地亞哥。

info.description: Cincinnati Financial Corp. engages in providing property casualty and life insurance services. It operates through the following segments: Commercial Lines Insurance, Personal Lines Insurance, Excess and Surplus Lines Insurance, Life Insurance, and Investments. The Commercial Lines Insurance segment includes commercial casualty, commercial property, commercial auto, worker's compensation, and other commercial lines insurance. The Personal Lines Insurance segment manages personal auto, homeowner, and other personal lines insurance. The Excess and Surplus Lines Insurance segment covers business risks such as the nature of the business or its claim history, that are difficult to profitably insure in the standard commercial lines market. The Life Insurance segment offers term life insurance, universal life insurance, worksite products, and whole life insurance services. The Investment segment generates revenue from the fixed-maturity investment and equity investment. The company was founded by John Jack Schiff Sr., Robert Cleveland Schiff, and Harry M. Turner in 1968 and is headquartered in Fairfield, OH.
info.industry_zh: 保險 - 財產與意外傷害
info.description_zh: 辛辛那提金融公司从事提供财产伤亡和人寿保险服务。它通过以下部门运营：商业保险、个人保险、超额和盈余保险、人寿保险和投资。商业保险部门包括商业伤亡保险、商业财产保险、商业汽车保险、工人赔偿保险和其他商业保险。个人保险部门管理个人汽车保险、房主保险和其他个人保险。超額和盈餘險種保險部門承保業務性質或其索賠歷史等商業風險，這些風險在標準商業險種市場上很難獲得盈利。人寿保险部门提供定期人寿保险、万能人寿保险、工地产品和终身人寿保险服务。投资部门通过固定期限投资和股权投资产生收入。该公司由 John Jack Schiff Sr.、Robert Cleveland Schiff 和 Harry M. Turner 于 1968 年创立，总部位于俄亥俄州费尔菲尔德。

info.description: Nordson Corp. engages in the engineering, manufacture and market of products and systems used for adhesives, coatings, sealants, biomaterials and other materials. It operates through the following segments: Industrial Precision Solutions, Medical and Fluid Solutions and Advanced Technology Solution. The Industrial Precision Solutions segment enhances the technology synergies between adhesive dispensing systems and industrial coating systems to deliver proprietary dispensing and processing technology to diverse end markets. The Medical and Fluid Solutions segment includes components and device solutions for medical, life science, high-tech industrial and other diverse end markets. The Advanced Technology Solution segment integrates proprietary product technologies found in progressive stages of a customer's production processes, such as surface treatment, precisely controlled dispensing of material and post-dispense test and inspection to ensure quality. The company was founded by Eric T. Nord, Evan W. Nord and Walter G. Nord in 1954 and is headquartered in Westlake, OH.
info.description_zh: Nordson Corp. 從事用於黏合劑、塗料、密封劑、生物材料和其他材料的產品和系統的工程、製造和銷售。它透過以下部門運作：工業精密解決方案、醫療和流體解決方案以及先進技術解決方案。工業精密解決方案部門增強了黏合劑點膠系統和工業塗層系統之間的技術協同作用，為不同的終端市場提供專有的點膠和加工技術。醫療和流體解決方案部門包括用於醫療、生命科學、高科技工業和其他多元化終端市場的組件和設備解決方案。先進技術解決方案部門整合了客戶生產流程各個階段的專有產品技術，例如表面處理、精確控制的材料分配以及分配後測試和檢查，以確保品質。該公司由 Eric T. Nord、Evan W. Nord 和 Walter G. Nord 於 1954 年創立，總部位於俄亥俄州韋斯特萊克。

info.description: Essex Property Trust, Inc. operates as a real estate investment trust. It engages in the ownership, operation, management, acquisition, development, and re-development of predominantly apartment communities. The company was founded by George M. Marcus in 1971 and is headquartered in San Mateo, CA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 住宅
info.description_zh: Essex Property Trust, Inc. 以房地產投資信託公司經營。它從事以公寓為主的社區的所有權、營運、管理、收購、開發和再開發。該公司由 George M. Marcus 於 1971 年創立，總部位於加州聖馬刁。

info.description: Viatris, Inc. is a global healthcare company, which engages in the provision of healthcare and pharmaceutical products. It provides medicines and treatments in various therapeutic areas such as cardiovascular, oncology, dermatology, eye care, gastroenterology, immunology, and women's healthcare. The firm operates through the following segments: Developed Markets, Greater China, JANZ, and Emerging Markets. The Developed Markets segment consists of operations primarily in North America and Europe. The Greater China segment includes operations in mainland China, Taiwan, and Hong Kong. The JANZ segment covers operations in Japan, Australia, and New Zealand. The Emerging Markets segment encompasses operations in developing markets and emerging economies including in Asia, the Middle East, South and Central America, Africa, and Eastern Europe. The company was founded on February 14, 2019 and is headquartered in Canonsburg, PA.
info.industry_zh: 藥品製造商 - 特用藥品和非專利藥品
info.description_zh: Viatris, Inc. 是一家全球醫療保健公司，從事提供醫療保健和藥品。它提供心血管、腫瘤學、皮膚病學、眼科護理、胃腸病學、免疫學和婦女保健等各個治療領域的藥物和治療。該公司透過以下部門營運：已開發市場、大中華區、JANZ 和新興市場。已開發市場部門主要在北美和歐洲開展業務。大中華區業務包括中國大陸、台灣和香港的業務。 JANZ 部門涵蓋日本、澳洲和紐西蘭的業務。新興市場部門涵蓋亞洲、中東、南美洲和中美洲、非洲和東歐等發展中市場和新興經濟體的業務。該公司成立於2019年2月14日，總部位於賓州卡農斯堡。

info.description: Agilent Technologies, Inc. engages in the provision of application focused solutions for life sciences, diagnostics, and applied chemical markets. It operates through the following segments: Life Sciences and Diagnostics Markets, Applied Markets, and Agilent CrossLab. The Life Sciences and Diagnostics Markets segment offers active pharmaceutical ingredients for oligo-based therapeutics as well as solutions that include reagents, instruments, software and consumables. The Applied Markets segment refers to the application-focused solutions that include instruments and software that enable customers to identify, quantify, and analyze the physical and biological properties of substances and products. The Agilent CrossLab segment spans the entire lab with its extensive services and consumables portfolio in addition to software and laboratory automation solutions. The company was founded in May 1999 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
info.description_zh: 安捷倫科技公司致力於為生命科學、診斷和應用化學市場提供以應用為中心的解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：生命科學和診斷市場、應用市場和安捷倫 CrossLab。生命科學和診斷市場部門提供基於寡核苷酸的治療的活性藥物成分以及包括試劑、儀器、軟體和消耗品的解決方案。應用市場部門是指以應用為中心的解決方案，包括使客戶能夠識別、量化和分析物質和產品的物理和生物特性的儀器和軟體。安捷倫 CrossLab 部門涵蓋整個實驗室，除了軟體和實驗室自動化解決方案之外，還提供廣泛的服務和耗材組合。該公司成立於 1999 年 5 月，總部位於加州聖克拉拉。

info.description: United Rentals, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the equipment rental business. It offers online services and equipment protection. It operates through the General Rentals and Specialty segments. The General Rentals segment includes the rental of construction, aerial and industrial equipment, general tools and light equipment, and related services and activities. The Specialty segment rents products and provides setup and other services on such rented equipment. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Stamford, CT.
info.description_zh: United Rentals, Inc.是一家控股公司，從事設備租賃業務。它提供線上服務和設備保護。它透過一般租賃和專業租賃部門運作。一般租賃部門包括建築、航空和工業設備、通用工具和輕型設備的租賃以及相關服務和活動。專業部門租賃產品並為此類租賃設備提供安裝和其他服務。該公司成立於 1997 年，總部位於康乃狄克州斯坦福。

info.description: Equity Residential is a real estate investment trust, which engages in the acquisition, development, and management of rental apartment properties, which includes the generation of rental and other related income through the leasing of apartment units to residents. The company was founded by Robert H. Lurie and Sam Zell in March 1993 and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 住宅
info.description_zh: Equity Residential 是一家房地產投資信託公司，從事租賃公寓物業的收購、開發和管理，其中包括透過向居民出租公寓單位產生租金和其他相關收入。該公司由 Robert H. Lurie 和 Sam Zell 於 1993 年 3 月創立，總部位於伊利諾州芝加哥。

info.description: Monster Beverage Corp. is a holding company, which engages in the development, marketing, sale, and distribution of energy drink beverages and concentrates. It operates through the following segments: Monster Energy Drinks, Strategic Brands, Alcohol Brands, and Other. The Monster Energy Drinks segment sells ready-to-drink packaged energy drinks to bottlers and full-service beverage distributors. The Strategic Brands segment sells concentrates and beverage bases to authorized bottling and canning operations. The Alcohol Brands segment offers craft beers, FMBs, and hard seltzers. The Other segment consists of certain products sold by its subsidiary, American Fruits and Flavors LLC, to independent third-party customers. The company was founded on April 25, 1990, and is headquartered in Corona, CA.
info.description_zh: Monster Beverage Corp. 是一家控股公司，從事能量飲料和濃縮液的開發、行銷、銷售和分銷。它透過以下部門運作：怪物能量飲料部門、策略品牌部門、酒精品牌部門和其他部門。 Monster Energy Drinks 部門向裝瓶商和全方位服務飲料經銷商銷售即飲包裝能量飲料。策略品牌部門向授權的裝瓶和罐裝企業銷售濃縮液和飲料基料。酒精品牌部門提供精釀啤酒、FMB 和硬蘇打水。其他部門包括其子公司 American Fruits and Flavors LLC 向獨立第三方客戶銷售的某些產品。該公司成立於1990年4月25日，總部位於加州科羅納。

info.description: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. engages in the retailing of home products. It operates through the following segments: Pottery Barn, West Elm, Williams Sonoma, Pottery Barn Kids and Teen and Other. The Other segment includes net revenues from international franchise operations, Rejuvenation and Mark and Graham. The company was founded by Charles E. Williams on September 15, 1956 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. 從事家居產品零售。該公司透過以下部門營運：Pottery Barn、West Elm、Williams Sonoma、Pottery Barn Kids and Teen and Other。其他部門包括來自國際特許經營業務、Rejuvenation 以及 Mark and Graham 的淨收入。該公司由 Charles E. Williams 於 1956 年 9 月 15 日創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: VICI Properties, Inc. is a real estate investment trust, which owns, acquires and develops gaming, hospitality and entertainment properties. It operates through the following segments: Real Property Business and Golf Course Business. The Real Property Business segment consists of leased real property. The Golf Course Business segment consists of four golf courses. The company was founded on July 5, 2016 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 多元化
info.description_zh: VICI Properties, Inc. 是一家房地產投資信託公司，擁有、收購和開發博彩、飯店和娛樂房地產。它透過以下部門運作：房地產業務和高爾夫球場業務。房地產業務部門包括租賃房地產。高爾夫球場業務部門由四個高爾夫球場組成。該公司成立於2016年7月5日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: The Home Depot, Inc. engages in the sale of building materials and home improvement products.
