Its products include building materials, home improvement products, lawn and garden products and decor products. The firm operates through the following geographical segments: U.S., Canada and Mexico. It offers home improvement installation services, and tool and rental equipment. The company was founded by Bernard Marcus, Arthur M. Blank, Kenneth Gerald Langone and Pat Farrah on June 29, 1978 and is headquartered at Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: The Home Depot, Inc. 從事建築材料和家居裝修產品的銷售。其產品包括建築材料、家居裝修產品、草坪和花園產品以及裝飾產品。該公司透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、加拿大和墨西哥。它提供家居裝修安裝服務以及工具和租賃設備。該公司由 Bernard Marcus、Arthur M. Blank、Kenneth Gerald Langone 和 Pat Farrah 於 1978 年 6 月 29 日創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: American Tower Corp. provides real estate investment services, and owns, operates, and develops multi-tenant real estate properties. It offers leasing of space on communications sites to wireless service providers, radio and television broadcast companies. The firm operates through the following segments: U.S. and Canada, Africa and APAC, Europe, Latin America, and Data Centers, and Services. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 專業
info.description_zh: American Tower Corp. 提供房地產投資服務，並擁有、經營和開發多租戶房地產。它向無線服務供應商、廣播和電視廣播公司提供通訊站點空間租賃服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：美國和加拿大部門、非洲和亞太地區部門、歐洲部門、拉丁美洲部門以及資料中心和服務部門。該公司成立於 1995 年，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: UDR, Inc. is a real estate investment trust, which owns, operates, acquires, renovates, develops, redevelops, disposes of, and manages multifamily apartment communities. It operates through the Same-Store Communities and Non-Mature Communities/Other segments. The Same-Store Communities segment refers to the properties that are acquired, developed, and stabilized occupancy. The Non-Mature Communities/Other segment includes recently acquired, developed and redeveloped communities, and the non-apartment components of mixed-use properties. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Highlands Ranch, CO.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 住宅
info.description_zh: UDR, Inc. 是一家房地產投資信託公司，擁有、經營、收購、翻新、開發、再開發、處置和管理多戶公寓社區。它透過同店社區和非成熟社區/其他部分運作。同店社區部分是指已收購、開發並穩定入住的物業。非成熟社區/其他部分包括最近收購、開發和再開發的社區，以及混合用途物業的非公寓部分。該公司成立於 1972 年，總部位於科羅拉多州高地牧場。

info.description: Prudential Financial, Inc. engages in the provision of insurance, investment management, and other financial products and services. It operates through the following segments: Prudential Investment Management, Inc. (PGIM), U.S. Businesses, International Businesses, and Corporate and Others. The PGIM segment is involved in the provision of investment management services and solutions related to public fixed income, public equity, real estate debt and equity, private credit and other alternatives, and multi-asset class strategies. The U.S. Businesses segment includes retirement strategies, group insurance, and individual life. The International Businesses segment focuses on investing in existing businesses and assessing acquisition opportunities. The Corporate and Other Operations segment relates to the corporate items and initiatives not allocated to business segments. The company was founded by John Fairfield Dryden in 1875 and is headquartered in Newark, NJ.
info.description_zh: Prudential Financial, Inc. 從事提供保險、投資管理以及其他金融產品和服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：保德信投資管理公司 (PGIM)、美國業務部門、國際業務部門以及企業及其他部門。 PGIM部門提供與公共固定收益、公共股權、房地產債務和股權、私人信貸和其他另類投資以及多資產類別策略相關的投資管理服務和解決方案。美國業務部門包括退休策略、團體保險和個人人壽保險。國際業務部門專注於投資現有業務和評估收購機會。公司和其他業務部門涉及未分配給業務部門的公司項目和計劃。該公司由 John Fairfield Dryden 於 1875 年創立，總部位於新澤西州紐瓦克。

info.description: Strategy, Inc. engages in the provision of enterprise analytics and mobility software. The firm designs, develops, markets, and sells software platforms through licensing arrangements and cloud-based subscriptions and related services. Its product packages include Hyper. The company was founded by Michael J. Saylor and Sanjeev K. Bansal on November 17, 1989, and is headquartered in Tysons Corner, VA.
info.description_zh: Strategy, Inc. 從事提供企業分析和行動軟體。該公司透過授權安排和基於雲端的訂閱及相關服務來設計、開發、行銷和銷售軟體平台。其產品包包括 Hyper。該公司由 Michael J. Saylor 和 Sanjeev K. Bansal 於 1989 年 11 月 17 日創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州泰森斯角。

info.description: Cadence Design Systems, Inc. engages in the provision of design and development of integrated circuits and electronic devices. It operates through the following geographical segments: Americas, Asia, EMEA, and Japan. The company was founded by Alberto Sangiovanni-Vincentelli, Gudmundur A. Hjartarson, K. Bobby Chao, and K. Charles Janac in June 1988 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Cadence Design Systems, Inc. 從事積體電路和電子設備的設計和開發。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美洲、亞洲、歐洲、中東和非洲和日本。該公司由 Alberto Sangiovanni-Vincentelli、Gudmundur A. Hjartarson、K. Bobby Chao 和 K. Charles Janac 於 1988 年 6 月創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: General Motors Co. engages in the designing, manufacturing, and selling of trucks, crossovers, cars, and automobile parts, and in providing software-enabled services and subscriptions. It operates through the following segments: GMNA, GMI, Cruise, and GM Financial. The company was founded by William C. Durant on September 16, 1908 and is headquartered in Detroit, MI.
info.description_zh: 通用汽車公司從事卡車、跨界車、轎車和汽車零件的設計、製造和銷售，並提供軟體服務和訂閱。它透過以下部門運作：GMNA、GMI、Cruise 和 GM Financial。該公司由 William C. Durant 於 1908 年 9 月 16 日創立，總部位於密西根州底特律。
